lines: Aaron has marked eleven short strokes around Fire Seven’s kettle.
"Nine cups arrived. Count the strokes before anyone calls that sufficient."

choices.label: Ask who is missing from the roll
Ask how the arrival fires govern themselves

lines: "The Bethel family and five road arrivals. Three more came from the culvert farms."
"We are not asking to jump the line. We are asking to exist inside it."

choices.label: Ask how the fires choose speakers

lines: "One speaker per fire, changed at dawn. The speaker counts cups and takes blame for noise."
"It is not law. It is what people build while law checks the wrong folder."
